content.en:
"Let's start taking this blood-red fruit, I hope it can really transform my copying talent!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed this blood-red fruit in one gulp, and immediately terrifying energy swept through his body, many times more majestic than any treasure that Ye Tian had swallowed in the past to raise the level of his copying talent.

I saw that this majestic energy was not absorbed by the physical body, but poured into the soul, absorbed by the origin imprint of the copied talent.

Suddenly, the copying talent began to undergo subtle changes, and the imprint began to transform and grow.

At the same time, the long-lost pain poured into the depths of his soul, but fortunately, Ye Tian could still bear it, and he didn't cry out in pain.

Soon, half an hour passed, the energy of the blood-red fruit was exhausted, and the transformation of the copying talent was completely over.

"Check!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and the situation of copying his talent appeared.

On the whole, the copying talent was not much different from before, but the scope of the investigation was much wider, and he found that he was able to fuse the Dao-level natal talent.

Before, Ye Tian couldn't fuse the ten Dao-level natal talents, but now he can.

It is conceivable that once the ten Dao-level natal talents are fused, what a terrifying Dao-level natal talent will be produced.

In addition, Ye Tian also found that the copying talent had an extra ability, and it was also a very awesome ability.

Replica the body!

In other words, Ye Tian can copy a body, which is exactly the same as the main body, and no one can detect the clues.

It seems that this ability is similar to that of a clone, but it is far from being comparable to a clone.

The clones condensed after the Heavenly Mandate Realm cannot be cultivated, even if the cultivation is low, the clones can be refined, these clones can be cultivated, but the potential is very low, and the combat effectiveness is not as good as the ontology at all.

The body that can be copied is different, that is, the second body, which has all the abilities of the body, and even has the ability to copy talents.

That's terrible!

Of course, Ye Tian can only copy one body now, and once this body falls, it can still recover, and it can be recovered in 10,000 years.

Just 10,000 years is nothing to Ye Tian, and this ability can completely save his life at a critical moment!

In addition to these, the abilities of the copying talent have increased dramatically, and it is simply not a level compared to before.

"This time I made a lot of money!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he used the ability to replicate his body.

I saw that a body was formed quickly, exactly the same as Ye Tian, and even the strength of the breath was exactly the same, not a little worse, and the soul breath, talent and so on were exactly the same.

It can be said that even if the Domain Ancestor who surpassed the Dao Ancestor came here, he would not be able to distinguish the difference between the two bodies.

"Whether or not you can escape from the Life God Mountain this time, I'm afraid it will depend on the ability to copy the body!"

Ye Tian pondered.

If he didn't have the ability to copy his body, if he went out, those Saint Ancestor, Great Saint Ancestor, and Old Ancestor of the Life Green Clan would probably attack him en masse.

With his strength, he couldn't stop the attacks of these strong men at all.

Maybe he could block an attack from a top Saint Ancestor, but as long as the Great Saint Ancestor level made a move, he would be finished.

The Great Saint Ancestor level of the Life Green Clan is almost comparable to the True Ancestor of the late Great Dao, and this is the world of the Life Green Clan, and they have a natural combat advantage when fighting here.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only rely on the ability to copy his body.

Of course, he couldn't be stupid enough to use the second body to attract attention, that would be useless.

Copying the body is not only copying his own body, but also copying the body of others, for example, he can copy the body of a Life Green Clan Guardian level, and then use that Guardian Guard-level body to leave the Life God Mountain.

In this way, he can easily leave the world of the Living Green Clan and return to the outside world.

But right now, Ye Tian was not ready to leave, but wanted to explore the secrets of this inheritance place.

Before, he didn't have the ability to probe, because once he went deeper, the powerful blood-colored memory would attack him, and the blood-colored figures he encountered behind all had Saint Ancestor-level combat power, and once the Great Saint Ancestor-level combat power appeared, he couldn't beat it.

Therefore, he had no choice but to flee.

But now it's different, he has the ability to copy his body, as long as it's a body, no matter what form he takes, he can copy it.

As a result, he was able to replicate the body of a blood-colored figure and blend into the core area of this heritage space.

As long as the copied body does not fall, it will have no effect, but once it falls, it will take 10,000 years to recover.

Relieve!

Ye Tian's second body dissipated, and immediately Ye Tian looked around for a blood-colored figure who was about the same level as his own cultivation.

There is a flaw in copying the body, that is, it is impossible to copy a body that is higher than his own cultivation, otherwise Ye Tian casually copies a Dao Ancestor body, wouldn't it be invincible?

No matter how much his ability to defy the heavens could not break the rules of the heavens, he could only choose to copy a blood-colored figure whose cultivation was comparable to that of a half-step True Ancestor.

Fortunately, there are many blood-colored figures in this inheritance space, and Ye Tian soon found it, and successfully copied it.

......

The place of inheritance of the sacred mountain of life, the core area.

A scarlet figure was speeding forward, leaping past one scarlet figure after another, and the other scarlet figures did not attack it.

Unlike ordinary blood-colored figures, this blood-colored figure kept looking around, and his eyes showed human emotions.

It is not an ordinary blood-colored figure, but a body copied by Ye Tian, which is completely controlled by Ye Tian.

"Sure enough, with such a blood-colored figure body, the other blood-colored figures treat me as a kind of person and don't attack me at all!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In this case, there will be no more secrets for him here.

If the Life Green knew that he had this ability, he would probably die of jealousy!

Soon, Ye Tian came to the core area of the Land of Inheritance.

Here, Ye Tian saw an incredible scene.

He saw a corpse, a tree man's corpse to be exact.

"Copy the talent, check!"

Under the investigation of the copying talent, the talent of this tree man was revealed.

Name: Lu Yin Daozu

Source Force Talent: Super God Level

Source Speed Talent: Super God Level

Source Talent: Super God Level

Yuanmu talent: super god level

Yuankong talent: super god level

......

Introduction: A sacred tree has been transformed into a Dao, at its peak for the Nine Heavens Invincible Dao Ancestor, the first glimpse of the mystery of the Domain Ancestor, offended a Domain Ancestor a long time ago, was severely injured by the Domain Ancestor, and was reduced to the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and then entered a domain realm to live in seclusion, when the domain was broken, he fought against a strong enemy and died, and when he was dying, he incarnated a realm in the infinite abyss

"Hey, the ability to copy talent can actually present a person's past, this ability is awesome!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Obviously, this was one of the new abilities, but he hadn't discovered it before, and it wasn't too late to discover it.

From the introduction, it can be seen that this tree man was once a divine tree, and later became the Nine Heavens Invincible Dao Ancestor.

Ninefold Heaven Invincible Dao Ancestor, what kind of concept is this, even in the Divine Heaven Realm, an Eightfold Heaven Supreme Dao Ancestor is almost invincible, and the Nine Heavens Dao Ancestor is too few and too few.

Moreover, this Nine Heavens Invincible Dao Ancestor named Green Yin has a first glimpse of the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor, and he definitely has the hope of becoming a Domain Ancestor.

But such a powerful invincible Dao Ancestor was still severely injured by the Domain Ancestor, and his cultivation was greatly reduced, and he encountered a battle of the Domain Realm Shattering, which was really unlucky.

Otherwise, it would be almost impossible for such an invincible Dao Ancestor to fall.

"In this way, the world where the Life Green Clan is located is the corpse of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor's body, and the Life Green Clan is a family evolved by the aura of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor, and this corpse should be the corpse of the core torso of the Green Yin Dao Ancestor!" Ye Tian guessed.

Immediately, Ye Tian's eyes widened, full of excitement.

This is the corpse of an invincible Dao Ancestor, how valuable it is, if it can obtain the inheritance of this existence, it will be even better.
